common.name: Name
sessions.title: Crawl Sessions
sessions.noSessionsDesc: Start your first crawl to begin analyzing your site.
newCrawl.title: New Crawl
newCrawl.sitemapOnly: Sitemap only (crawl only URLs found in sitemaps)
newCrawl.measureCWV: Measure Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, TTFB)
newCrawl.excludePatternsHint: One pattern per line. URLs containing any of these strings will not be crawled, but links to them will still be recorded.
session.label: Label
session.disassociateConfirm: Remove this session from the project?
session.title: Title
stats.title: Global Stats
stats.confirmDeleteUnassigned: Delete all sessions without a project? This cannot be undone.
compare.title: Compare Crawls
logs.title: Application Logs
api.subtitle: Use this API to automate crawls, read results, or connect your tools (LLMs, scripts, etc.)
api.referenceDesc: All available endpoints with absolute URLs. Copy and paste to your LLM or script.
api.authInfo: Auth: Basic ({user}) or API key via {header} header
api.copyKeyNow: Copy it now — it won't be shown again:
projects.title: All Projects
project.deleteProjectDesc: Permanently delete this project and unlink all its sessions. This action cannot be undone.
project.deleteProjectWithSessionsDesc: Permanently delete this project and all its crawl sessions, including all crawl data. This frees disk space but cannot be undone.
project.noSessions: No crawl sessions in this project yet.
settings.title: Settings
settings.restoreConfirm: Restore from {name}? The application should be restarted after restore.
resumeModal.title: Resume Crawl
htmlModal.noHtml: No HTML stored for this page.
urlDetail.title: Title
urlDetail.backlinksLocked: Connect SEObserver to see external backlinks pointing to this page.
urlDetail.backlinksEmpty: No backlinks found for this URL.
links.backlinksNeedProject: Associate this session with a project that has SEObserver data to see Backlinks.
pagerank.noData: No Internal PageRank data available. Compute Internal PageRank first.
pagerank.weightedNeedProject: Associate this session with a project that has SEObserver data to see Weighted PageRank.
robots.noData: No robots.txt data. Run a crawl first.
robots.simulatorDesc: Edit the robots.txt below, then run the simulation to see which crawled URLs would be newly blocked or allowed.
robots.noChanges: No changes — all URLs keep their current status.
robots.selectHost: Select a host to view its robots.txt
sitemaps.noData: No sitemaps found. Run a crawl first.
sitemaps.selectSitemap: Select a sitemap to view its URLs
extChecks.viewSources: View pages linking to this URL
tests.noRulesets: No rulesets yet. Create one to start testing pages.
tests.extractAllWarning: "Extract ALL" rules may produce large results on pages with many matching elements (capped at 20 items per page).
tests.ruleRequired: At least one rule is required
gsc.notAssociated: This session is not associated with a project.
gsc.associateFirst: Associate it with a project first, then connect Google Search Console.
gsc.connectDesc: Link this project to GSC to see search queries, impressions, clicks, and indexation status.
gsc.selectPropertyDesc: Choose the Search Console property to associate with this project.
gsc.noProperties: No properties found. Make sure your Google account has access to Search Console properties.
gsc.noData: No Search Console data yet. Click "Refresh Data" to fetch.
providers.notAssociated: This session is not associated with a project.
providers.associateFirst: Associate it with a project first, then connect an SEO data provider.
providers.connectDesc: Link this project to SEObserver to get backlinks, rankings, referring domains, and visibility data.
providers.lockCta: Connect your SEObserver account to unlock this data — backlinks, rankings, top pages, and more.
providers.title: Title
providers.noData: No SEO data yet. Click "Fetch Data" to retrieve data from SEObserver.
providers.keepCurrentKey: Leave empty to keep current key
providers.fetchLimitsHelp: Maximum number of rows to fetch from the API for each data type.
providers.disconnectWarning: Disconnecting will remove the API key and all fetched data for this provider.
reports.requiresAudit: Requires audit computation. Click a sub-view to load.
report.overview.noStats: No stats available. Run a crawl first.
report.overview.zeroPagesExplain: No pages were crawled. Check the Directives tab — the seed URL may be blocked by robots.txt. You can restart with "Ignore robots.txt" enabled.
api.confirmDeleteProject: Delete this project? Associated API keys will also be deleted.
providers.topPages.title: Title
authority.title: Authority
authority.connectCta: Connect your SEObserver account to unlock Authority data (TrustFlow, CitationFlow, backlink metrics per page).
authority.fetchCta: Fetch Authority Data to see TrustFlow and CitationFlow for your crawled pages.
authority.enrichmentDisconnected: Connect SEObserver to enrich {count} crawled pages with TrustFlow, CitationFlow and backlink data
authority.enrichmentConnected: {matched} of {total} pages matched with authority data — see Authority tab
extract.noSets: No extractor sets yet. Create one to extract data during crawl.
extract.noResults: No extraction results. Run an extractor set first.
extract.extractorRequired: At least one extractor is required
extract.resultsAvailable: {count} pages with extraction data — click to view
extract.runRequiresHtml: Re-run on stored HTML (requires store_html enabled)
hreflang.title: Hreflang Validation
hreflang.noIssues: No hreflang issues found. Click Compute to run validation.
hreflang.noIssuesForPage: No hreflang issues for this page.
onboarding.step1Subtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Set default crawling behavior. You can override these per crawl.
onboarding.step3Subtitle: Help us improve SeeseoCrawler. You can change this anytime.
onboarding.telemetryCollectItems: Feature usage (which pages you visit), app version, OS type, crash reports
onboarding.telemetryNeverItems: URLs you crawl, your data, IP address, any personal information
onboarding.windowsSubtitle: SeeseoCrawler needs ClickHouse to store crawl data. Let's set it up.
onboarding.winInstallPrompt: ClickHouse is not installed yet. Pick an installation method below:
onboarding.winDockerStep1: Install Docker Desktop if you don't have it already.
onboarding.winDockerStep2: Launch Docker Desktop and wait for it to start.
onboarding.winDockerStep3: Open a terminal (PowerShell or CMD) and run:
onboarding.winWslStep1: Open PowerShell as Administrator and run:
onboarding.winWslStep2: Restart your computer, then open the new Ubuntu terminal.
onboarding.winWslStep3: In the Ubuntu terminal, install and start ClickHouse:
onboarding.winReadyToContinue: You're all set. Click Next to continue.
settings.telemetryDesc: Send anonymous usage data to help us improve SeeseoCrawler. No personal data, URLs, or crawl content is ever collected.
settings.sessionRecordingDesc: Record full browser sessions and send them to PostHog. This includes all URLs, page content, and clicks visible in your SeeseoCrawler UI.
settings.sessionRecordingWarning: WARNING: When enabled, the SeeseoCrawler team can see everything displayed in your browser session. Only enable this for debugging purposes.
settings.sessionRecordingBanner: Session recording is active — the SeeseoCrawler team can see your screen.
interlinking.noOpportunitiesHint: Click "Analyze Interlinking" to find pages that could benefit from internal links. Requires store_html to be enabled.
interlinking.noSimulations: No simulations yet. Select opportunities and click Simulate.
interlinking.importHint: Paste one link per line: source_url,target_url (comma or tab separated)
interlinking.cannibalizationHint: These pages are too similar and risk cannibalizing each other in SERPs. Consider merging content or setting up a redirect.
